subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Praised be God! Blessed is this Day, for it hath attained its connection with Truth. Blessed is the day at its dawning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بحمد الله یوم مبارکی است چون که نسبت بحق پیدا کرده مبارک است روز بدو طلوع است
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
